title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
target_user: Small households living without access to light
problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
core_concept: Live, harvestable herbs in the kitchen.
proposed_approach: A subscription for pre-grown, potted herbs that are replaced weekly.
prototype_scope: Deliver 20 potted herbs to 15 kitchens and replace them weekly for one month. | Source 20 potted herbs; Recruit 15 households; Execute weekly delivery/replacement; Measure herb survival and user satisfaction

title: KitchenCodex
target_user: Home hobby cooks attempting complex international cuisine
problem_or_desire: Information silos occurring during parallel recipe preparations across multi-ingredient workflows
proposed_approach: Instead of procedural text recipe formats, render active time steps chronologically per critical ingredient node
prototype_scope: Horizontal scrolling chart mapping preparation stages from prep work to cook time by category

title: Vendor Selection Orchestrator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding legitimate, non-spammy shipping and fulfillment partners
core_concept: A curated, private directory of vetted e-commerce fulfillment partners.
proposed_approach: A curated directory of vetted 3PL vendors for small e-commerce brands, focusing on reliability and transparency.
prototype_scope: A Google Sheets portal connecting 5 retailers to 3 vetted vendors. | Vet 3 reliable 3PL vendors.; Create a landing page/portal.; Onboard 5 retailers.; Facilitate introductions.

title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
core_concept: Continuous entitlement auditing via automated API connection to single sign-on access logs.
proposed_approach: Periodic cross-comparison of user access timestamps against user seating assignment lists, highlighting license retirement recommendations.
prototype_scope: Script that performs a one-time automated scan of two disparate identity management SaaS platform usage records.

title: User-Generated Video Repository
problem_or_desire: Inability to find or license high-quality, authentic smartphone unboxing footage
core_concept: A direct procurement bridge for authentic consumer video assets.
proposed_approach: A curated community connecting D2C brands with creators for authentic unboxing and product usage videos.
prototype_scope: A closed Slack group vetting 20 creators and 20 brands. | Recruit 20 creators.; Recruit 20 brands.; Facilitate connections in Slack.; Monitor quality of output.

title: BeatRoute Runner
problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
core_concept: Rhythm-action game mechanics applied to physical running cadence.
proposed_approach: A rhythm-based running app where the user selects a pre-mixed track and the game provides haptic or audio cues to match their stride to the beat.
prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused app that plays one pre-selected track and uses the accelerometer to track if the user's steps align with the beat. | Integrate accelerometer data stream; Implement beat-detection logic for one track; Build simple UI for feedback on stride alignment

title: Coffee Bean Upcycling Kit
problem_or_desire: Guilt over the volume of spent coffee grounds generated daily
core_concept: A subscription service that collects spent grounds and provides pre-measured additives to convert them into garden fertilizer or exfoliating scrubs
proposed_approach: Provide compostable collection bins and monthly pickup/conversion kits
prototype_scope: A 30-day pilot with 15 households to test collection logistics

title: Micro-batch Kitchens for Allergens
problem_or_desire: Anxiety around cross-contamination in communal food spaces
core_concept: Visual transparency of food preparation for allergy-sensitive users.
proposed_approach: A specialized meal prep service providing time-stamped video clips of the preparation process for specific orders.
prototype_scope: Prepare 3 allergen-free meals for 5 users, providing a recorded video of the assembly process for each. | Define strict allergen-free protocols; Set up recording station; Prepare 15 meals with video proof; Gather feedback on trust levels

title: Corporate Coffee Wellness Program
target_user: HR departments focused on employee health
problem_or_desire: Excessive caffeine consumption leading to afternoon crashes
core_concept: A service that replaces high-caffeine office coffee with a rotating selection of low-caffeine, high-antioxidant coffee alternatives
proposed_approach: Supply management and educational signage about caffeine intake
prototype_scope: A one-month trial in one department of a mid-sized company

title: Community Tool Library
problem_or_desire: Lack of storage space for infrequently used tools and appliances.
core_concept: A neighborhood-based lending platform for household items.
proposed_approach: A web app that manages inventory, availability, and lending status for a closed group of neighbors.
prototype_scope: A simple list view of available items with a 'request to borrow' button.
